records.headline: Moderate Thunderstorms with lightning, gusty wind 40-50 kmph and moderate rainfall is very likely to occur at a few places over Narasaraopeta, Chirala, Bapatla, Nizampatnam, Ponnur, Guntur, Sattenapalle. Piduguralla areas of Bapatla, Guntur and Palnadu in next 3 hours.
మీ ప్రాంతంలో పిడుగులు పడే అవకాశం ఉంది.ఉరుములు మెరుపులతో కూడిన వర్షం పడేప్పుడు చెట్లు,టవర్స్,పోల్స్,పొలాలు,బహిరంగ ప్రదేశాల్లో ఉండరాదు.సురక్షితమైన భవనాల్లో ఆశ్రయం పొందండి-ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం.
अगले 3 घंटों में अररिया, मधेपुरा, मधुबनी, पूर्णिया, सहरसा और सुपौल में कुछ जगहों पर मध्यम दर्जे की आंधी-तूफान और 50-60 किमी प्रति घंटे की रफ़्तार से ज़मीनी हवा चलने की बहुत संभावना है।

There is a possibility of lightning in your area. During thunderstorms, avoid trees, towers, poles, fields, and open spaces. Seek shelter in safe buildings - Andhra Pradesh Government.
अगले 3 घंटों में बेगूसराय, दरभंगा, खगड़िया, मधेपुरा, मुंगेर, सहरसा और समस्तीपुर में कई जगहों पर बिजली कड़कने, तेज़ हवाओं (50-60 किमी/घंटा) और बारिश के साथ आंधी-तूफान आने की बहुत संभावना है।

River Tista at Mekhliganj in Coochbehar district of West Bengal continues to flow in above normal flood situation at 6:00 am today.

Moderate Thunderstorms with surface wind reaching upto 40kmph is very likely to occur at isolated places over Hyderabad, Kamareddy, Medak, Medchal Malkajgiri, Ranga Reddy, Sangareddy, Siddipet, Vikarabad, Mancherial, Bhadradri Kothagudem, Khammam, Mahabubabad, Mulugu, Suryapet in next 3 hours.
Light to Moderate rain withThunderstorm with Lightning is likely to occur at isolated places over Coimbatore, Kanniyakumari, Salem, Theni in next 3 hours.

Light Thunderstorm and lightning with surface wind(30-40 kmph) accompanied with rain  is very likely to occur at a few places over Dumka, East Singhbum, Godda, Hazaribagh, Khunti, Koderma, Pakur, Ramgarh, Ranchi, Sahebganj, Saraikela Kharsawan, West Singhbhum in next 3 hours.
